sections.heading: Systemic
sections.content: Systemic therapy is used in the neoadjuvant setting to downstage bulky nodal disease, in the adjuvant setting for high-risk features post-surgery, and as first-line or subsequent-line treatment for metastatic or recurrent penile cancer. Cisplatin-based regimens are the cornerstone, with emerging role of immunotherapy in select biomarker-defined populations.

cards.name: TIP
cards.detail: Setting: Neoadjuvant, adjuvant, first-line metastatic. Drugs: Paclitaxel 175 mg/m2 IV over 3 hours Day 1, Ifosfamide 1200 mg/m2 IV over 2 hours Days 1–3, Cisplatin 25 mg/m2 IV over 2 hours Days 1–3. Cycle days: Repeat every 3 to 4 weeks. Key toxicities: Myelosuppression, nephrotoxicity, neuropathy, alopecia, nausea/vomiting.

cards.name: Cisplatin/Fluorouracil
cards.detail: Setting: Adjuvant, first-line metastatic. Drugs: Fluorouracil 800–1000 mg/m2/day continuous infusion IV Days 1–4 or 2–5, Cisplatin 70–80 mg/m2 IV Day 1. Cycle days: Repeat every 3 to 4 weeks. Key toxicities: Myelosuppression, mucositis, nephrotoxicity, neuropathy.

cards.name: Cisplatin/Fluorouracil + Pembrolizumab followed by maintenance
cards.detail: Setting: First-line metastatic. Drugs: Fluorouracil 1000 mg/m2/day continuous infusion IV Days 1–4, Cisplatin 70 mg/m2 IV Day 1, Pembrolizumab 200 mg IV Day 1. Cycle days: Repeat every 3 weeks for 6 cycles, then maintenance pembrolizumab 200 mg IV every 3 weeks for up to 34 cycles. Key toxicities: Immune-related adverse events, myelosuppression, nephrotoxicity.

cards.name: Carboplatin/Fluorouracil + Pembrolizumab followed by maintenance
cards.detail: Setting: First-line metastatic. Drugs: Fluorouracil 1000 mg/m2/day continuous infusion IV Days 1–4, Carboplatin AUC 5 IV Day 1, Pembrolizumab 200 mg IV Day 1. Cycle days: Repeat every 3 weeks for 6 cycles, then maintenance pembrolizumab 200 mg IV every 3 weeks for up to 34 cycles. Key toxicities: Myelosuppression, nephrotoxicity, immune-related adverse events.

timeline.title: 1st Line
timeline.body: TIP, Cisplatin/fluorouracil, Cisplatin/fluorouracil or carboplatin/fluorouracil plus pembrolizumab followed by maintenance

timeline.title: Subsequent-line
timeline.body: Clinical trial or pembrolizumab for MSI-H/dMMR or TMB-H, Paclitaxel, Cetuximab
